title: Follow-up Issue Spec
description: Specification for one follow-up issue to be filed by the file-each-followup step in audit-issue. One spec per high-severity gap.

gap_id.description: ID of the source gap from gap-set (e.g. `g1`).

body.description: Markdown body of the follow-up issue. Includes context, file:line anchors, and acceptance criteria.

labels.description: Labels to apply (e.g. `enhancement`, `bug`, plus the originating audit slug).

severity.description: Inherited severity from the gap. The file-each-followup step files only critical and high.

acceptance.description: Acceptance criteria checklist items (one bullet each).

parent_issue.description: Reference to the parent audit issue this follow-up was spawned from.
